name: The General Store
description:
You are inside the general store.  All sorts of human pieces are stacked on shelves
behind the counter, It is a terrible vision.

extra_descriptions.description:
The note reads:

  List  - Show which various items are in the store.
  Buy   - Buy an item.
  Value - The shopkeeper will (free of charge) tell how much he will
          pay for your item.
  Sell  - Sell an item.
